title: Croatian Pork Skewers
description: A simple and flavorful recipe for pork skewers with a Croatian twist.

ingredients.name: pork shoulder, cut into 1-inch cubes
ingredients.notes: Try to get the leaner cuts for this recipe

ingredients.name: crisp white wine
ingredients.notes: This will help to tenderize the meat

ingredients.name: croatian paprika
ingredients.notes: This is key to the Croatian flavor, adjust to taste

ingredients.name: skewers
ingredients.notes: Soak them in water for at least 30 minutes before using

instructions: 2. In a large bowl, whisk together the wine, paprika, garlic, salt, and pepper.
3. Add the pork cubes to the marinade and mix until they are fully coated.
4. Thread the marinated pork onto the skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
5. Brush the skewers with olive oil.
6. Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the pork is cooked through.
7. Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
